articles.description:
With Valentine's Day coming up this week, Crumbl bakes the new Strawberry Heart Cake, Dubai Chocolate Strawberry Brownie, and more as part of its limited-time weekly rotation of desserts.

Here's what this week's lineup from February 8 through February 14, 2026, looks like:


- New Strawberry Heart Cake (pictured)- A heart-shaped strawberry cake topped with strawberry cream cheese frosting.
- Dubai Chocolate Strawberry Brownie - Crumbl continues the Dubai chocolate trend with a fudge brownie layered with kataifi and pistachio filling, topped with milk chocolate, fresh strawberry slices, and a drizzle of pistachio cream.
- Salted Caramel Cheesecake Cookie - A chilled graham cracker cookie rolled in graham cracker crumbs and topped with cheesecake frosting, caramel, and a dash of sea salt.
- Valentine's M&M's Cookie - A warm cookie packed with red, pink, and white M&M's candies.
Photo via Crumbl.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Crumbl Bakes New Strawberry Heart Cake and Dubai Chocolate Strawberry Brownie

articles.description:
Sonic launches the new Chocolate Peanut Butter Shake Made with Reese's as a limited-time flavor. The fast-food chain also brings back its Fish Sandwich for the 2026 Lenten/seafood season.

The Chocolate Peanut Butter Shake Made with Reese's features vanilla soft serve blended with chocolate syrup, peanut butter syrup, and Reese's Peanut Butter Cups, topped with whipped topping and a maraschino cherry.
Sonic's Fish Sandwich features wild-caught Alaska pollock filet served with tartar sauce and shredded lettuce on a toasted bun.
Prices vary, but a location near me in Los Angeles charges $6.59 for the shake in a medium size and $4.99 for the Fish Sandwich.
Photo via Sonic.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Sonic Launches New Reese's Chocolate Peanut Butter Shake

articles.description:
Starbucks debuts two new Valentine's Day beverages for a limited time alongside two new permanent matcha beverages.

The Valentine's Day drinks include:
- White Chocolate Strawberry Cream Cold Brew - Inspired by chocolate-covered strawberries, the drink features cold brew coffee and vanilla-flavored syrup, topped with White Chocolate Strawberry Cream Cold Foam and chocolate curls. While it's available, the White Chocolate Strawberry Cream Cold Foam can be added to any cold beverage.
- Strawberry Shortcake Frappuccino - A Creme Frappuccino swirled with strawberry puree and cinnamon dolce syrup, topped with whipped cream and a caramel-sugar sprinkle. 
While the Valentine's Day beverages are here for a limited time only, the two new matcha drinks are available year-round and include:
- Iced Double Berry Matcha - Layers of strawberry puree, matcha, and Raspberry Cream Cold Foam served over ice. Raspberry Cream Cold Foam can be added to any cold beverage year-round, and the raspberry syrup used to make it is also a permanent customization option.
- Iced Banana Bread Matcha - Matcha, brown sugar syrup, milk, and ice, topped with Banana Cream Cold Foam and a caramel crunch topping. 
Photo via Starbucks.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Starbucks Welcomes 2026 Valentine's Day Drinks

articles.description:
The Sea Dog and Fish 'n Chips are back at Wienerschnitzel in time for the 2026 Lenten/seafood season.

The Sea Dog (pictured) is like a hot dog but with a fish filet instead of a frankfurter. Specifically, it features a battered and fried fish filet nestled in a steamed hot dog bun with American cheese and tartar sauce. Prices vary, but it costs $4.99 at my local Wienerschnitzel in Los Angeles.
Wienerschnitzel's Fish 'n Chips features two or four battered and deep-fried fish filets accompanied by French fries and tartar sauce. A two-piece order costs $6.59 near me, while a four-piece order costs $11.99.
Both seasonal Lent-friendly items are now available for a limited time.
Photo via Wienerschnitzel.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Sea Dog and Fish 'n Chips Return to Wienerschnitzel

articles.description:
Jimmy John's has partnered with Hellmann's to launch the new Meal Diamond Deal for a limited time at participating locations nationwide through February 22, 2026.

The Meal Diamond Deal features a Ham & Three Cheese Melt, chips, and a regular fountain drink for a price that varies by location. A Meal Diamond Meal with a regular-sized sub costs $12.69 near me in Los Angeles (it's $21.99 with a Giant sub).
A Ham & Three Cheese Melt is a sub featuring double ham, cheddar, parmesan, and provolone, served on toasted French bread. It normally costs $11.69 near me, which means the deal nets you chips and a drink for $1. That's the same as a "make a sandwich a combo for $1" deal that Jimmy John's has been offering since last month (prices may vary by location).
The name of the meal requires some explanation: During this year's Super Bowl, Hellmann's will be airing a commercial starring comedian Andy Samberg as "Meal Diamond," a riff on musical artist Neil Diamond, singing "Sweet Sandwich Time," a parody of Neil Diamond's hit song, "Sweet Caroline." You can view the longform version of the ad below (a shortened 30-second spot will air during the game):

Photo via Jimmy John's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Jimmy John's Launches New Meal Diamond Meal

Available as a digital exclusive on the KFC website and mobile app at participating locations nationwide, Wedges and Queso Dip features a large side of crispy, seasoned potato wedges paired with 16 ounces of queso dip (something that is not normally on the KFC menu).
Prices vary, but my local KFC in Los Angeles charges $8.99 for an order.
For a limited time, the fried chicken chain is also offering a "20 wings for $20" deal to its KFC Rewards members.
Photo via KFC.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: KFC Introduces New Wedges and Queso Dip

articles.description:
Chick-fil-A is testing two new sandwiches for a limited time: the Avocado Sriracha BLT Sandwich and the Sweet Chili Lime Crunch Sandwich.

The Avocado Sriracha BLT Sandwich (pictured) is testing at participating locations in Oklahoma City, OK, and features a crispy-fried Original Chicken filet served with green leaf lettuce, tomato, seasoned avocado mash, and applewood-smoked bacon on Sriracha Swirl Toast (which is toasted bread swirled with a "sriracha style seasoning blend"). Cayenne Ranch Sauce is included on the side for those who want to add more heat. The sandwich is also available with a spicy or grilled filet. Prices range from $7.69 (for the Original Chicken filet) to $8.65 (for the grilled filet).
️The Sweet Chili Lime Crunch Sandwich is available at participating locations in the Piedmont Triad area (Greensboro, High Point, and Winston-Salem) of North Carolina. It features a crispy-fried Original Chicken filet, Ginger Lime Cool Crunch (a mix of cabbage, kale, and ginger lime dressing), and sweet chili sauce, served on a toasted, buttered bun. It can also be ordered with a spicy or grilled chicken filet. Prices range from $6.19 to $7.09, depending on your choice of filet.
Both sandwiches are available, while supplies last, through March 7, 2026.
Photo via Chick-fil-A.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Chick-fil-A Tests New Avocado Sriracha BLT Sandwich and Sweet Chili Lime Crunch Sandwich

articles.description:
Crispy Chicken Nuggets make a limited-time return to Taco Bell and are joined by new Hidden Valley Diablo Ranch Sauce.

The new dipping sauce features the "signature, creamy flavor of Hidden Valley Ranch with the smoky, rich heat of Taco Bell's iconic Diablo sauce." Hidden Valley Ranch is the original ranch dressing, while Diablo sauce is Taco Bell's spiciest regularly available sauce.
Taco Bell's Crispy Chicken Nuggets feature pieces of white-meat chicken covered in a crispy-fried breading that includes flakes of tortilla. The suggested price for a 5-piece order is $4.99, and a 10-piece order costs $7.99.
Photo via Taco Bell.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Taco Bell Brings Back Crispy Chicken Nuggets with New Hidden Valley Diablo Ranch

articles.description:
Love Potion #31 ice cream returns to Baskin-Robbins as its February 2026 Flavor of the Month and is featured in the new Love Potion #31 Cappy. The ice cream parlor chain also welcomes two new ice cream cakes for the 2026 Valentine's Day season.

Love Potion #31 features white chocolate and raspberry-flavored ice creams with raspberry swirls, chocolate‑flavored chips, and raspberry‑filled chocolate hearts.
The new Love Potion #31 Cappy features Love Potion #31 blended with Arabica coffee, topped with whipped cream and a fudge drizzle.
The new Valentine's Day ice cream cakes include the Vintage Heart Cake and Vintage Cherry Cake.
The Vintage Heart Cake is a heart-shaped cake featuring a light pink frosted base trimmed with pink, red, and white borders and dotted with frosted hearts.
The Vintage Cherry Cake is also a heart-shaped cake, but is decorated differently with "cherries, romantic piping, and heart details."
Both cakes can be made with your choice of ice cream and cake. They come in two sizes: a small size meant for two to four people and a large size to feed up to 12 people.
The Valentine's Day-themed cakes, ice cream, and Cappy are now available for a limited time nationwide.
Photo via Baskin-Robbins.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Baskin-Robbins Brings Back Love Potion #31 Along with New Love Potion #31 Cappy

articles.description:
Jack in the Box bolsters its rice bowl and wrap offerings with the addition of the new Chicken Fajita Protein Bowl (it's also now referring to its rice bowls as "protein bowls") and the Fajita Jack Wrap. It also adds Jack's Sugar Cookie and Red Bull Peach Edition.

The Chicken Fajita Protein Bowl features crispy-fried or grilled chicken served over white or brown rice with grilled onions, roasted corn, black beans, cheddar cheese & Chipotle Ranch. It joins the Chicken Teriyaki Protein Bowl on the menu. 
The Chicken Teriyaki Protein Bowl features crispy-fried or grilled chicken served over white or brown rice, accompanied by broccoli, carrots, and a teriyaki sauce.
Both bowls start at $7.69. They can also be ordered as part of a combo meal that includes an egg roll and a drink.
The Fajita Jack Wrap consists of crispy-fried or grilled chicken strips, shredded lettuce, shredded cheddar, grilled onions, tomato, and Chipotle Ranch wrapped in a warm tortilla. Pricing starts at $3 (you can also mix and match any Jack Wrap at 2 for $6).
Jack's Sugar Cookie is a buttery sugar cookie decorated with icing in one of four Jack faces. The price tag on the cookie starts at $2.49.
Red Bull Peach Edition is offered at Jack in the Box by the can and as part of a Red Bull Infusion beverage mixed with either strawberry & tangerine syrup or mixed berry syrup. Prices start at $2.99 for a can and $4.99 for an Infusion.

articles.description:
Krispy Kreme is ready for Valentine's Day this month with the arrival of its 2026 Valentine's Day Collection of donuts.

This year's Valentine's donuts include:
- New I Love You a Choco-Lot Donut - A heart-shaped donut filled with chocolate-flavored Kreme, dipped in red vanilla-flavored icing, and topped with a chocolate icing ribbon and bow.    
- New Teddy Bear Cookies & Kreme Donut - A heart-shaped donut filled with Cookies & Kreme, dipped in chocolate icing, and topped with a white chocolate bear face. 
- New You're Berry Sweet Donut - A heart-shaped donut filled with Kreme, dipped in strawberry-flavored icing, and topped with a red vanilla-flavored drizzle and an XOXO sugar piece.  
- New Sprinkled with Love Donut - An Original Glazed donut piped with buttercream-flavored frosting and heart sprinkles. 
The donuts are available individually or by the dozen in a Valentine's Day-themed box at participating locations across the US starting Tuesday, February 3, through Valentine's Day (Saturday, February 14, 2026). You can also find them in a six-pack at select grocery retailers.
In addition to the introduction of this year's Valentine's Day donuts, Krispy Kreme is offering a Groundhog Day deal through Tuesday, February 3, 2026, where you can get $6 off any Assorted Dozen at participating locations.
Photo via Krispy Kreme.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Krispy Kreme's 2026 Valentine's Day Donuts Arrive

articles.description:
Panera reintroduces Asiago Bagel Stacks as a permanent addition to its lunch and dinner menu. They are joined by a new, limited-time trio of Breakfast Bagel Stacks.


The permanent Asiago Bagel Stacks include:
- Chicken Roma Asiago Bagel Stack - Grilled chicken, melty fresh mozzarella, vine-ripened tomatoes, chopped basil, fresh arugula, Green Goddess dressing, salt,, pepper, and a garlic aioli drizzle on an Asiago Bagel.​
- Spicy Steak Asiago Bagel Stack - Marinated steak, melty provolone, creamy salsa verde spread, fresh arugula, red onions, and sweet peppers on an Asiago Bagel.​
As for the new, limited-time Breakfast Bagel Stacks (breakfast items are available before 11AM), they include:
- Wake-Up BLT Asiago Everything Bagel Stack (pictured) - Applewood-smoked bacon, scrambled egg, vine-ripened tomatoes, fresh arugula, salt, pepper, and cheesy benedict sauce, served on a new Asiago Everything Bagel. The new bagel is a bagel baked with "sharp and tangy" asiago cheese and an everything bagel seasoning made of sesame seeds, poppy seeds, dried garlic, dried onion, and salt.
- Farmhouse Duo Asiago Bagel Stack - Applewood-smoked bacon, sausage patty, scrambled egg, salt, pepper, and cheesy benedict sauce, served on an Asiago Bagel.
- Sausage & Egg Asiago Bagel Stack -A sausage patty, scrambled egg, melty American cheese, salt, pepper, and garlic aioli, served on an Asiago Bagel.
Other new items at Panera include:
- Asiago Croissant Twists - Two all-butter croissant twists topped with asiago cheese.
- Toasted Caprese Focaccia - Melty fresh mozzarella, vine-ripened tomatoes, fresh arugula, basil pesto spread, salt, pepper, and balsamic glaze, served on Black Pepper Focaccia.
The new Asiago Everything Bagel can also be purchased on its own.
Photo via Panera Bread.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Asiago Bagel Stacks are Back at Panera
